title: Dyatlov Pass Incident: 60 Saal Purana Sabse Khau... | RAAZ FILES
description:
dyatlov pass incident: russia ke pahado mein un 9 trekkers ke saath kya hua tha? - Dyatlov Pass Incident ke 9 Russian hikers ke saath 1959 mein kya hua tha? Kyun unhone apna tent andar se kaata aur bina kapdo ke maut ke pahad par bhage? Kya ye koi military experiment tha, aliens ka hamla, ya phir ek rare slab avalanche? Janiye kaise Disney ki Frozen movie ke software ne is 60 saal purani mystery ka parda fash kiya. Subscribe to RAAZ FILES for more mind-bending true mysteries!

Is video mein: Dyatlov Pass Incident: Russia ke pahado mein un 9 trekkers ke saath kya hua tha? se judi unsolved mystery, real story aur mind-blowing facts -- poori kahani Hinglish mein, RAAZ FILES par.

Aapko kya lagta hai dosto? Kya ye sach mein ek rare avalanche tha ya phir Russian military ka koi chupaya gaya raaz? Mujhe comments mein zaroor batao. Aur agar aapko aisi hi mysteries pasand hain, toh Raaz Files ko abhi subscribe karo aur bell icon daba do. Agli video mein hum parda uthayenge ek aise jahaz se jo samandar ke beechon-beech bilkul sahi salamat mila, lekin uske saare crew members achanak hawa mein gayab ho gaye. Milte hain agle raaz ke saath!
